posts.author: larslodewijckx (Lars Lodewijckx)
posts.cookedHtml:
Make sure to join Xebia’s New Features webinar on February 4th 15:00 CET!

Learn how monday.com’s newest innovative features will improve your workflows, including:

  • Group By Anything
  • AI-Powered Translation
  • Portfolio Management Solution
  • And much more…

Register here: Explore monday.com's Latest Features

Even if you can’t make it at the scheduled time, make sure to register if you want to receive a recording!
